evidence_references.quote: 환자의 적정장해는  4) 척추에 심한 기형을 남긴 때, 지급률 50%"에 해당하며, 골절
척주에 심한 기형을 남긴 때(지급률 50%) 후유장해 진단

warnings: case_type = 후유장해: the case centers on a permanent spinal-deformity disability and the 장해지급률/합산장해율 dispute (의료자문·교보 50% vs KB paid 40%; 기왕증 감액 at its core). template_id = 배상책임_후유장해형, the canonical 후유장해 template key in templates/registry.json (the registry bundles 배상책임 and 후유장해 under one template; this case is 후유장해 with no 배상책임/liability element).

secondary_case_type 진단·수술비 genuinely applies (not a hedge): the pack also contains actually-claimed-and-paid surgery/fracture-diagnosis 담보 (KB 5대골절진단비·골절진단비·상해수술비, 교보 재해수술비). These do NOT change the report template — the primary 후유장해 drives template selection per registry — but the surgery/diagnosis-benefit line items are real and downstream (screening/draft) should reflect them.
실손 not applicable: the only 실손 mention is a boilerplate disclaimer paragraph on 교보 손해사정서 p5; no 실손의료비 담보 was claimed or paid. Listed in candidate_types at low confidence for audit only.
